home.title: We Turn Local Businesses Into Market Leaders
home.subtitle: From strategy to execution — we help Hurghada’s best businesses grow faster, rank higher, and convert better.
home.description: MediaBubble is a full-service marketing agency based in Hurghada, Egypt. Since 2015, we’ve helped 200+ brands grow through SEO, branding, web development, and paid advertising — measuring outcomes, not just outputs.
home.imageAlt: MediaBubble team working on a campaign strategy

hero.title: We Don’t Just Think Outside the Box — We Redefine It.
hero.subtitle: A full-service marketing and advertising agency based in Hurghada, Egypt. Founded in 2015, built on results.

story.heading: Our Story
story.body: MediaBubble was founded in Hurghada in 2015 with one goal: help local businesses compete and win. What started as a small creative studio has grown into a team of 22+ strategists, designers, developers, and media specialists — all focused on one thing: your growth.
story.body2: We believe great marketing isn’t magic — it’s strategy, craft, and relentless measurement. Every campaign we run is tied to a metric that matters to your business.

creative.name: Creative
creative.def: Ideas with a point of view. Not decoration, not trend-following — work that earns attention because it earns trust.

strategic.name: Strategic
strategic.def: Every decision traces back to a goal. We align visual choices, copy, and media to what you’re actually trying to achieve.

dataDriven.name: Data-Driven
dataDriven.def: Numbers inform, not decide. We read performance data, test hypotheses, and improve — creative judgment stays in the loop.

team.heading: The Team Behind Your Growth
team.subheading: 22+ specialists across strategy, design, development, and media.

hero.title: Everything Your Business Needs to Grow Online
hero.subtitle: From SEO to branding, paid ads to web development — we cover every channel that moves the needle.

seo.title: Rank Higher, Get More Customers
seo.subtitle: SEO & Organic Growth
seo.description: We help Hurghada businesses rank on the first page of Google — where your customers are already searching. Our SEO strategies combine technical optimization, local search, and content that converts.
features: Local SEO for Hurghada & Red Sea Governorate

ppc.title: Reach Customers Ready to Buy
ppc.subtitle: Paid Advertising (PPC)
ppc.description: Stop wasting budget on clicks that don’t convert. Our paid advertising team runs Google Ads, Meta Ads, and display campaigns that target the right people at exactly the right moment.

social.title: Build a Community That Converts
social.subtitle: Social Media Marketing
social.description: We manage your social presence so you can focus on running your business. From content creation to community management, we build audiences that become customers.

branding.title: Look Like the Market Leader You Are
branding.subtitle: Branding & Design
branding.description: Your brand is your first impression and your lasting reputation. We build brand identities that reflect your values, connect with your audience, and stand out in a crowded market.

web.title: A Website That Works as Hard as You Do
web.subtitle: Web Development
web.description: Your website should be your best salesperson — available 24/7, fast, and built to convert visitors into customers. We design and develop websites that look great and perform even better.

content.title: Content That Ranks and Converts
content.subtitle: Content Marketing
content.description: Great content doesn’t just fill a blog — it attracts organic traffic, builds authority, and nurtures prospects into buyers. We create content that serves your business goals, not just your word count.

events.title: Make Every Event Unforgettable
events.subtitle: Events & Activations
events.description: From corporate launches to experiential activations, we handle the strategy, creative, and logistics that make your event a success — and make sure people talk about it long after.

cta.heading: Not Sure Where to Start?
cta.body: Book a free 30-minute strategy call. We’ll review your current marketing, identify the biggest opportunities, and tell you exactly where to focus first.

hero.title: Results We’re Proud Of
hero.subtitle: 200+ brands. 500+ projects. One focus: measurable growth.
